title: creamy quick uruguayan potato bake
description: a comforting, creamy potato bake dish with a nutty flavor from marjoram and a crispy top from double-fried potatoes. perfect for a quick and easy weeknight meal.
instructions: in a large bowl, toss the sliced potatoes with 2 tablespoons of oil and a pinch of salt until they are evenly coated.
add the marjoram, garlic powder, and a sprinkle of black pepper to the potatoes and toss to combine.
spread half of the potatoes in the bottom of a 6 ramekins or small baking dishes, followed by half of the grated cheese, and then the remaining potatoes and cheese.
dot the top of each ramekin with some of the double-fried potatoes and a sprinkle of parmesan cheese.
cover the ramekins with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
remove the ramekins from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
